title: Canadian Breakfast Skillet
description: A hearty, satisfying breakfast skillet filled with tender tofu, crunchy Canadian bacon, and invigorating flavors.
instructions: Cook the Canadian bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat until crispy.
Remove the Canadian bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the cubed tofu to the skillet and cook until golden brown.
Add the diced bell pepper and onion to the skillet and cook until tender.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and invigorating seasoning blend.
Pour the egg mixture over the tofu and vegetables in the skillet.
Cook the eggs until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese.
Return the skillet to the stovetop and cook over low heat until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve the Canadian Breakfast Skillet hot, garnished with crispy Canadian bacon.
